claims.summary: Hard generation-budget boundaries should be represented exactly.
claims.disposition: Verified exact 512/513 and 1024/1025 requested-budget classifications and boundary tests.

claims.summary: Felt pressure and response density should remain evidence rather than hidden control inputs.
claims.disposition: Verified current diagnostics preserve their separate provenance and make no control transition.

claims.summary: Equal requested budgets should be compared across different semantic densities.
claims.disposition: Routed to an offline provider fixture using stored metadata only and no prompt or model-policy change.

claims.summary: Spectral state could select a dynamic generation budget.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because it would make substrate evidence a live model scheduling and generation control.
